embed.title: !summary
embed.description: Buffered, scheduled delivery of alerts grouped by reward. Currently supports `quest` only. Opt a tracking rule in by adding `summary` (e.g. `{{prefix}}quest pikachu summary`); matched quests are held in memory and dispatched as grouped messages at the times you set here.

fields.name: Status
fields.value: `{{prefix}}summary quest` — show your current schedule and how many quests are currently buffered.

fields.name: Set the schedule
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}summary quest settime mon07:30 weekday07:30 weekend10:00`
`{{prefix}}summary quest settime every08:00` — fire every day at 08:00

Day prefixes:
• `mon`/`tue`/`wed`/`thu`/`fri`/`sat`/`sun` — a single day
• `weekday` — Mon–Fri
• `weekend` — Sat–Sun
• `every` (or `everyday`) — all seven days

Format: `<prefix><HH>:<MM>` (e.g. `mon07:30`, `every08:00`). The colon and minutes are optional — `mon7` is treated as `mon07:00`. List as many times as you like in one command; they replace any existing schedule.

fields.name: Clear the schedule
fields.value: `{{prefix}}summary quest cleartime` — remove the schedule. Quests still buffer; you can flush them on demand with `{{prefix}}summary quest now`.

fields.name: Dispatch now
fields.value: `{{prefix}}summary quest now` — dispatch everything currently in your buffer right away (does not affect the schedule).

fields.name: Opting a rule in
fields.value:
Add `summary` when you create the rule:
`{{prefix}}quest pikachu summary`
`{{prefix}}quest rare_candy summary`

`{{prefix}}tracked` shows `summary` on each rule that uses it.
